summary: Festive fireworks celebration countdown timer component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/countdown-firework/src/CountdownFirework.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `CountdownFirework` and `countdownFireworkDefaultProps`, then register the `CountdownFirework` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Countdown Firework Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/countdown-firework to my project. Preserve the exported CountdownFireworkProps API and register the CountdownFirework composition with the default props.
